title: cymbidium canaliculatum
intro: Cymbidium canaliculatum, also known as the yellow-bellied orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Caledonia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its health benefits also include antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Cymbidium canaliculatum are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory and immune system health.
